BLOCKS_PER_MONTH().notice: ~1 month in 12s blocks, used for monthly vouch cap.

monthlyVouchCount(bytes32,uint64).notice: Monthly vouch count per voucher. Keyed by (popId, monthBucket).

reportDefault(uint64).notice: Report that the vouchee defaulted on an external protocol while a vouch was active. Permissioned to the Indexer or governance.
